title: Change hero CTA button color to white-pink

requirements.summary: Change the hero section CTA button background color from white to white-pink (e.g., bg-pink-100 or #fff0f5) while ensuring text remains legible
acceptanceCriteria: The CTA button in the hero section of HomePage.tsx has a white-pink background color (e.g., bg-pink-100, #fff0f5, or similar soft pinkish-white tone) instead of white.
Button text is clearly legible against the new white-pink background.
No other buttons or elements outside the specified XPath target are changed.

file_operations.description: Locate the CTA button element in the hero section at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[3]/div[5]/a[1]/button[1] and change its background color class from white (likely 'bg-white') to a white-pink tone such as 'bg-pink-100' or use inline style with '#fff0f5'. Ensure button text color provides sufficient contrast for legibility (e.g., adjust text-gray-900 or similar dark text if needed). Do not modify any other button elements on the page.
